metadata.description: Resource name prefix (used for all resource naming)
Location for all resources
SQL Server administrator username
SQL Server administrator password
Deploy Azure OpenAI (set to false when using external/shared OpenAI)
External OpenAI endpoint (required if deployOpenAI is false)
External OpenAI API key (required if deployOpenAI is false)
Azure AI Search SKU
Location for AI Search (override if SKU unavailable in primary location)
Allow all IPs to access SQL Server (test/dev only, default OFF)
Chat model deployment name (must match appsettings DeploymentName)
Embedding deployment name (must match appsettings EmbeddingDeploymentName)
Embedding model name (text-embedding-3-small or text-embedding-3-large)
Deploy Azure Key Vault for secret management (set to false for flat env var config)
Deploy Log Analytics + Application Insights for monitoring
Allow shared key access on storage account (false required by enterprise policy)
Additional tags to apply to all resources (merged with default tags)
Deploy Container Apps for API, MCP, and Web
Container image tag (e.g., latest, v1.0.0)
Container registry server (GHCR)
Container registry username (GitHub username or org)
Container registry password (GHCR PAT with read:packages)
API key for selfhosted authentication
JWT secret for selfhosted token signing
SuperAdmin password for initial setup

properties.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog=McpKnowledge;Persist Security Info=False;User ID={1};Password={2};MultipleActiveResultSets=True;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('sqlAdminUsername'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))]

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}', '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('sqlAdminUsername'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))), createObject('name', 'AzureOpenAI__Endpoint', 'value', if(parameters('deployOpenAI'), createObject('name', 'AzureOpenAI__ApiKey', 'value', if(parameters('deployOpenAI'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', format('{0}-openai-{1}', parameters('prefix'), 'AzureOpenAI__EmbeddingDeploymentName', 'value', parameters('embeddingDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'AzureAISearch__Endpoint', 'value', format('https://{0}.search.windows.net', 'value', 'AzureBlob'), createObject('name', 'Storage__Azure__BlobEndpoint', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2022-09-01').primaryEndpoints.blob), createObject('name', 'Storage__Azure__ContainerName', 'value', 'selfhosted-files'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('prefix'))), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'SelfHosted__ApiKey', 'value', parameters('apiKey')), createObject('name', 'SelfHosted__JwtSecret', 'value', parameters('jwtSecret')), createObject('name', 'SelfHosted__SuperAdminPassword', 'value', parameters('adminPassword')), createObject('name', 'Database__AutoMigrate', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'MCP__ServiceKey', 'value', variables('mcpServiceKey'))), if(variables('hasRegistryAuth'), parameters('registryPassword'))), createArray()))]

[concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}', parameters('registryServer'))), createObject('name', 'Knowz__BaseUrl', 'value', format('https://{0}-api.azurewebsites.net', parameters('prefix'))), createObject('name', 'MCP__BackendMode', 'value', 'selfhosted'), createObject('name', 'MCP__ApiKeyValidationEndpoint', 'value', '/api/vaults'), createObject('name', 'Authentication__ValidateApiKey', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'MCP__ServiceKey', 'value', variables('mcpServiceKey'))), if(variables('hasRegistryAuth'), createArray(createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_USERNAME', 'value', parameters('registryUsername')), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_PASSWORD', 'value', parameters('registryPassword'))), createArray()))]

[concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_PORT', 'value', '8080'), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}', parameters('registryServer'))), createObject('name', 'API_UPSTREAM', 'value', format('{0}-api.azurewebsites.net', parameters('prefix'))), createObject('name', 'API_SCHEME', 'value', 'https')), if(variables('hasRegistryAuth'), createArray(createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_USERNAME', 'value', parameters('registryUsername')), createObject('name', 'DOCKER_REGISTRY_SERVER_PASSWORD', 'value', parameters('registryPassword'))), createArray()))]
